_readme: Andah language tree data — the single source of truth for the app. Full schema: docs/schema.md. Edit this file freely in VS Code (the running app refreshes itself), or use the in-app forms. The Demovian/Tessic families below are DISPOSABLE DEMO content.

languages.name: Proto-Demovian
languages.notes: Demo family root — this whole Demovian family is placeholder content. Delete it (or ask Claude to replace it) when you add real Andah languages.

languages.name: Korvish
languages.notes: Branches off a mid-chain stage (Old Demovian).

languages.name: Portside Creole
languages.notes: Two-parent creole — Demovian grammar over a Tessic trade vocabulary.

languages.name: Proto-Tessic
languages.notes: Second demo family, for cross-family features.
